description:
Record of the birth of a child in May 1197 CE. Dated according to two Jewish calendars, the Coptic calendar, and the Muslim calendar.  (Information from Goitein’s index card.) Cf. T-S NS 306.64 (PGPID 25233).
Anno mundi: Friday night, 20 Iyar 4957 (the 17th year of Maḥzor 261). 
Seleucid: 20 Iyar 1508 Seleucid
Coptic: 15 Pashons 913
Hijrī: 21 Jumādā II 593
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
